holdings.infoBox: EMGF is an equity ETF with a total of 702 individual holdings. The top holdings are Taiwan Semiconductor Manufacturing Company stock at 10.07%, Samsung Electronics at 7.98%, SK hynix at 6.47%, Tencent Holdings at 2.49%, and Alibaba Group Holding at 1.55%.

overview.description: The iShares Emerging Markets Equity Factor ETF (EMGF) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in total market equity. The fund tracks an index of large- and mid-cap equities from emerging markets. Stocks are selected and weighted to optimize exposure to five factors: quality, value, momentum, smaller size and low volatility. EMGF was launched on Dec 8, 2015 and is issued by BlackRock.
